title: Bombastic
body:
# Bombastic Sending you pipe bombs since 2024

## 📔 About *This mod was made for Modfest: Carnival* Ever wandered your Minecraft world, and thought it was... missing something? Well, we have the ***solution*** for **you**! Introducing: Bombastic! Challenged with a carnival theme, we have risked our sanity to bring you a truly explosive experience. With items such as the Party Popper, Confetti Cannon, Firecrackers, and Pipe Bombs, this mod is guaranteed to make your world a whole lot more ~~dangerous~~ interesting. Made with ♥ by WorldWidePixel and CallMeEcho. ## ❓ FAQ * Forge?
No. * Backport to `x`?
No. Multiversion modding is hard, annoying, and not worth the effort. * Nuclear bombs?
You never know... ## 🌳 Hollow Would you like a mod like Bombastic that improves overall Vanilla experiences and features? Try [Hollow](https://modrinth.com/mod/hollow)!
